Wade buys a sandwich to eat now, one for the road, and one for in the evening. He also buys 2 drinks. The drinks cost $4 each, so the total cost for the drinks is [drink_cost] * [number_of_drinks] = [total_drink_cost]. Wade spends a total of $26, so the remaining amount is [total_spent] - [total_drink_cost] = [remaining_amount]. This remaining amount is for the sandwiches, and since he buys 3 sandwiches, the cost per sandwich is [remaining_amount] / [number_of_sandwiches] = [cost_per_sandwich].
